text:
OK, then I get:

interrupt                          total       rate
irq1: atkbd0                         900          3

irq14: ata0                         9412         36

irq16: uhci0++                     10084         38
irq19: iwn0 uhci2++                 6400         24
irq20: hpet0                       43476        167
irq22: hdac0                          95          0
irq23: uhci3 ehci1                    84          0
irq256: re0                         1436          5
Total                              82157        317


…and CPU usage is back to normal.
